occupation: Vice President Sales - UK, Nordics and MENA at Perion
headline: Vice President, Sales - UK, Nordics and MENA
summary:
I am a result-driven sales and commercial leader with comprehensive experience in areas across all media (traditional, digital and programmatic), Adtech, new business development, and commercial performance. I am well versed in providing cross-functional leadership and overseeing associated functions to include strategic sales and marketing, branding and advertising, KPI management, P&L oversight, business partnering, client consulting, team building, and stakeholder relations. I hold demonstrated success spearheading internal initiatives focused on increasing efficiencies, reducing costs, and maximising company profitability. 

In addition, I am a strong communicator experienced in leading employees and managing relationships with diverse clients and stakeholders at all levels. I have also been accountable for developing and implementing new sales structures, establishing commercial strategy and securing commercial contracts, managing the launch of digital products, and directing key advertising and rebranding activities. Further, I am a multifaceted professional capable of leveraging extensive industry experience and management skills to drive the continued achievement of organisational objectives. 

I am known as a versatile contributor with experience in all sales, marketing, and commercial development functions, exceptional communication and leadership skills, and a continued commitment to implementing industry best practices.

experiences.title: Vice President Sales - UK, Nordics and MENA
experiences.description: My role as market lead in the UK across all commercial, supply and demand, expanded in remit to also include The Nordics and also the MENA region.

experiences.title: Vice President - Sales, UK
experiences.description: Hivestack is the leading global, full stack, marketing technology company that powers the buy and sell-side of programmatic digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising.  Initially responsible for launching the business across EMEA, and currently leading the business in the UK and also responsible for identifying and developing emerging markets in the region

experiences.title: Regional Managing Director
experiences.description: Responsible for all aspects of enterprise in local markets for this exciting Out-Of-Home start up business, working with some brilliant people in exciting locations across the UK.

experiences.title: Founder/Chief Delivery Officer
experiences.description:
•	Launched and oversaw a media and business consultancy that connected the right people and ideas, identified opportunities, and resolved challenges. 
•	Developed solutions to ensure businesses stand out and succeed in competitive markets.

experiences.title: Agency Director/Group Business Director
experiences.description:
•	Served on the senior management team directing one of three national business hubs with accountability for up to 40 staff and extensive revenue  (£100m+)
•	Managed all platforms within four main pillars; broadcast, social, mobile, and live.
•	Engaged with clients and collaborated across Omnicom and Publicis agencies to guide investment, planning, and partnership activities. 
•	Developed and implemented new sales structure and approach to achieve agency group trading targets and deliver year on year growth of up to 40%. 
•	Served on commercial team to manage the digital launch of DAX (audio streaming) in the UK and managed subsequent digital spend across all deals.
•	Ensured collaboration across business departments and integrated improved culture and sales processes.

experiences.title: Director of Sales and Marketing
experiences.description:
•	Directed business operations in the UK with accountability for commercial output and company P&L.
•	Developed sales and marketing strategy and led subsequent market implementation.
•	Established a unique identity and marketing strategy for King to include a new brand name, tone, and behaviours.
•	Spearheaded the rebranding and launch of King Out of Home; managed associated portfolio structuring and branding of product categories. 
Secured new commercial deals resulting in a doubling of revenue and brand count in 18 months.

experiences.title: National Sales Director
experiences.description:
•	Provided leadership to a team of 20 across three UK offices.
•	Oversaw all sales targets and bonuses, KPIs, staff appraisal and development, and client sales activities.
•	Established strategic direction of company and managed sales proposition to direct clients, agencies, and specialists.
•	Partnered with general manager to develop commercial strategy including trading policies, rate cards, volume deals, and customer incentives.
•	Served on the senior management team to manage commercial relationships with airports and guide budgeting, cash flow management, and P&L.
•	Collaborated with marketing to create sales collateral, category strategies, and related communications and events.
•	Successfully restructured department and brand proposition in 2011; key contributor to global brand re-launch in 2012 involving the development and communication of a new client-centric sales approach. 
•	Consistently delivered on annual business plans and sales strategy for each of the company’s three airport client partners; exceeded Gatwick and Stansted budgets each year. 
•	Achieved YOY revenue increase of 33% while diversifying and growing brand and category count.
•	Directed roll out of digital across key airports resulting in a new trading mechanism and a significantly increased yield. 
•	Instrumental in securing the largest direct client business for Eye UK within the beauty category.

experiences.title: Head of Sales, London
experiences.description: Headed Sales team in London office, working alongside Head of Sales Strategy and Head of Sales in Manchester as the EYE Fly UK Sales Management team.

experiences.title: Head of Sales
experiences.description:
•	Hired to introduce and manage a new department within the Westfield London franchise, the UK’s premiere retail destination and the UK’s most premium digital ‘out-of-home’ estate.
•	Provided cross-functional leadership and managed a team of five.
•	Oversaw daily sales activities and associated sales strategy, brand management, trade communication, and trading approach functions.
•	Commissioned research to provide key insights and strengthen the retail proposition to clients in difficult economic circumstances.
•	Achieved revised first year target during the launch of a new product despite a period of economic uncertainty; subsequently met second year target five months ahead of schedule with 50% YOY growth. 
•	Delivered core component of the pitch that won ‘Outdoor Sales Team’ of the year for two consecutive years at Campaign Media Awards. 
•	Introduced a proposal to sell retail in conjunction with other CBSO formats and environments, working in partnership rather than isolation to increase company revenue. 
•	Developed an extended retail strategy that laid the foundation for subsequent successful tenders for Westfield Stratford contract in advance of the London 2012 Olympics.

experiences.title: Head of Business Development
experiences.description:
•	Initially hired to engage with planners and understand clients’ business to educate direct clients of agencies, drive organic business growth, and onboard new advertisers.
•	Utilised a consultancy-based approach to create a role for Metro via relevant cross-platform solutions involving newspaper display, sponsorship, promotions, creative executions, events, online & digital, contract publishing, etc. 
•	As head of business development, developed and implemented overall strategy to include creating annual business targets, identifying tactics to deliver record new business, and ensuring existing key accounts receive best in class service.
•	Received commendation at 2005 Campaign Media Awards for delivering solution for the HSBC ‘Sale’ campaign.
•	Winner at 2005 Campaign Media Awards and runner-up at Media Week for creating and delivering solution for the Nike ‘Go Nocturnal’ campaign. 
•	Delivered £6M in incremental revenue resulting from execution of new business development strategy in the first full year.
•	Acted as deputy to Executive Planning Director with accountability for standing in during board meetings as needed.

experiences.title: Senior Planner to Media Manager
experiences.description:
•	Served as client contact on the £40M GBP Barclays account., responsible for strategic and implementation planning across all media channels.
•	Part of the team accountable for relaunching the bank under ‘Fluent in Finance’ campaign with emphasis on meticulously planned multimedia communications.

experiences.title: Account Planner/Manager
experiences.description: After vigorous recruitment, I was accepted onto this excellent scheme for a grad entering the industry.  Three months were spent in various departments including planning, press, TV and research.  After 12 months I took on a full time position in strategic planning department, suiting my skill set and ambitions.  Cut teeth working on smaller FMCG/Pharmaceutical accounts (SMA, Combe International and Novartis) but much involvement despite limited experience.  Also acquired role as authority on ambient media following thesis at university.

experiences.title: Intern
experiences.description: Time spent within LeoBase (Database marketing), Account Management and Media Planning departments.

recommendations:
Anthony Ganjou

I have worked closely with Lee across various companies in the OOH and broader media sectors. I’ve been constantly impressed by his experience, commercial acumen and strategic ability.

Paul Kinvig FRSA

When we launched the Bournemouth Town Centre Gift Card, it coincided with Alight Media's installation of their digital advertising screens in our town centre. Lee was instrumental in helping create the 'partnership'between the BID & Alight and working with him was a joy. His knowledge, professionalism and willingness to go the extra mile to deliver real value to us as a BID and the town at large was consistent and welcome. There is no doubt that his creativity & strategic thinking allied to the delivery of the platform helped us successfully implement one of the most important projects the BID has undertaken.

Anthony Ganjou

I have worked closely with Lee across various companies in the OOH and broader media sectors. Ive been constantly impressed by his experience, commercial acumen and strategic ability.
